name: The Cold Open
title: Your business runs on heat.
body: Every call, lead, and job lands hot — and starts cooling the second no one’s there to strike.
entry_state: a faint cold grey-blue ambient over a completely dead, extinguished forge-works — nothing burning anywhere
exit_state: still near-dark; a single drifting ember floating ahead of the camera, its small amber glow the only warmth in frame
still_169: Cinematic photorealistic night world of an ancient Celtic iron forge carved into black bedrock. Near-total darkness — the only light: a faint cold grey-blue ambient over a completely dead, extinguished forge-works, nothing burning anywhere. Deep near-black shadows (#0A0908); where lit, molten amber highlights (#E9A94F), ember orange (#E2622B), rust (#B5623A), warm cream glow (#E7CFAE); where dead, cold ash grey-blue on black iron. Volumetric smoke haze, wet black stone with faint reflections, subtle carved Celtic knotwork worked into the rock surfaces. Dark industrial realism, low-key chiaroscuro lighting, anamorphic cinematic feel, atmospheric depth. No people, no figures, no hands, no text, no letters, no numbers, no signage, no logos. Subject: a vast dead forge-works seen from high and wide, every station extinguished: ash-grey anvils, molds hardened into slag mid-pour, cold hammers hanging motionless on their chains, dark crucibles, frozen black runner channels between the stations, a dark passage barely visible at the far end. Faint cold grey-blue ambient the only illumination, everything else falling to near-black. Composition: the dead stations arranged low across the frame with generous dark negative space and headroom above.

leg_prompt: Cinematic photorealistic night world of an ancient Celtic iron forge carved into black bedrock. Near-total darkness — the only light: a faint cold grey-blue ambient over a completely dead, extinguished forge-works, nothing burning anywhere. Deep near-black shadows (#0A0908); where lit, molten amber highlights (#E9A94F), ember orange (#E2622B), rust (#B5623A), warm cream glow (#E7CFAE); where dead, cold ash grey-blue on black iron. Volumetric smoke haze, wet black stone with faint reflections, subtle carved Celtic knotwork worked into the rock surfaces. Dark industrial realism, low-key chiaroscuro lighting, anamorphic cinematic feel, atmospheric depth. No people, no figures, no hands, no text, no letters, no numbers, no signage, no logos. The camera begins high and wide over the dead forge-works, every station extinguished under the faint cold grey-blue ambient, then descends slowly and glides forward between the cold stations — passing ash-grey anvils, molds hardened into slag mid-pour, and cold hammers hanging motionless — foreground shapes drifting by with gentle parallax. Midway, a single live ember drifts in past the lens from behind the camera, a small floating point of warm amber glow, and floats onward ahead of the lens; the camera follows it deeper through the dead works toward a dark passage at the far end, the drifting ember's small amber glow the only warmth in the near-dark frame. Single continuous camera move with no cuts. Smooth, graceful, slow cinematic motion. No people, no text. In the final second the camera settles into a slow, steady forward drift, perfectly smooth.
